parsed_review.summary: CP00-448 is a descriptor-only RP14.P08 fixture/test slice (M06 Synthetic Fixture Set tail S14-S22 plus M07 Test And Golden Case Set head S01), risk class A, 10 units. The pack-level claim is conservative and supported: manifest and command-evidence both set production_ready=false and runtime_ready=false with implementation_layer=descriptor; the only positive claim is the descriptor-verified flag (settlement_core_p08_fixture_test_slice_descriptor_verified). Pack binding is mutually consistent across registry.js:375, the contract historical_pack_bindings tail and p08_fixture_test_slice_descriptor projection (contract 26067/26778), the manifest, the baseline, and the live closeout-pack-plan.json:410 — matching pack_id, range RP14.P08.M06.S14-RP14.P08.M07.S01, deliverable counts {implementation 7, hermes_evidence 2, test 1}, micro_title counts {Synthetic Fixture Set 9, Test And Golden Case Set 1}, and next CP00-449 / RP14.P08.M07.S02. All descriptor rows are descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, customer_safe_errors_only=true, raw_payload_included=false, under the inherited no-write/no-real-data attestation (no settlement/origination/allocation/working-credit runtime, no audit or state writes, no DB rows, no object storage, no Hermes runtime receipt, no command runtime, no real fixture data, no raw payload). Authority boundary holds: Claude is read-only and not final approver (promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false; authority_boundary.claude_is_final_approval=false) and no enterprise trust is claimed from local validation — enforced in validators.js:4070-4077 and asserted in model.test.js:1549/1566. Hermes patterns are used only for the descriptor-only review packet/receipt shape (descriptor_only_settlement_p08_fixture_test_slice_no_write), not product runtime. Changed source (registry.js, service.js, validators.js) is pure functions returning frozen objects with no fs/network/db/exec/process.env usage; required_public_exports are re-exported via index.js export *. Tests and the contract validator cover plan coverage, descriptor-only rows, and authority boundaries with no .only/.skip. Readiness auth preflight passed (exit 0, valid JSON result, 1446-byte stdout) — no auth failure, zero-byte, malformed, fenced, or tool-call-shaped output. Two P3 informational notes only: (1) the post-review artifacts claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json are not yet present, which is expected because the hardening_sequence produces them after this read-only run and they must exist before commit/final closeout; (2) the 26 command-evidence exit codes are self-reported and cannot be re-executed under read-only tools, so this PASS attests artifact consistency and source support, deferring execution truth to the deterministic control-plane gates and human final approval. No P0/P1/P2 issues found; the pack does not block pack-level or goal-level closeout, and final enterprise-trust approval remains a human responsibility outside this receipt.

findings.title: Post-review required artifacts not yet present (expected at this stage)
findings.details: manifest.required_pack_artifacts lists claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json, which are absent from docs/closeout-packs/cp00-448/ at this read-only review stage. Per manifest.pack_level_claude_review.hardening_sequence, these are produced by later steps (normalize -> finding_adjudication -> construction_inspection) that consume this review's output, so their absence now is expected and is not a defect.
findings.recommendation: Ensure all three artifacts are generated from the accepted review and pass receipt/final-closeout validation before commit; do not close the pack until they exist and validate.

findings.title: Command-evidence exit codes are self-reported, not re-executed in read-only review
findings.details: All 26 recorded commands (including npm test, npm run build, npm run validate, npm run goal:closeout:validate, git diff --check) report exit_code 0, but under the read-only tool set (Read/Grep/Glob, no Bash) these cannot be independently re-executed. Static inspection corroborates the descriptor-only, no-write, and no-real-data claims, and model.test.js contains non-skipped CP00-448 coverage (plan coverage, descriptor-only rows, authority boundaries), so the recorded evidence is internally consistent with the source.
findings.recommendation: Keep execution verification gated by the deterministic control-plane (closeout-pack receipt/normalize/validate and final closeout validation) plus human final approval; treat this read-only PASS as attesting artifact consistency and source support, not independent command re-execution.
